scenes.name: Lady of the Woods
scenes.summary: Eudora the dryad tests the party's honesty and may offer a secret path into the estate.

beats.summary: Earn Eudora's help by truth, charm, or careful manipulation.

scenes.name: The Estate in the Storm
scenes.summary: Rain lashes the manor while zombies dig trenches around old walls and hidden defenses wait in stone and shadow.

beats.summary: Choose and execute an entry plan.

scenes.name: The Perfect Storm
scenes.summary: At the top of the tower, lightning, necro-alchemy, and unresolved grief converge around Siegfried's final experiment.

beats.summary: Defeat or stop Siegfried before the storm animates his masterpiece.
